title: Step Crafter
description: Adds a Step Crafter and Step Requester which allows recursive crafting and keeping items in-stock to Refined Storage
body:
If you want to put this mod in your modpack, feel free to use it :)

This mod adds a Step Crafter and Step Requester which allows recursive crafting and keeping items in-stock to Refined Storage To use the Step Crafter, input a pattern and then Shift + Click it to set the minimum and maximum amounts. Whenever the network's stored amount of the output of the pattern drops below the defined minimum, it will automatically craft items until the maximum level is restored.
To use the Step Requester, select the resource you want to maintain and click to configure its minimum, maximum, and batch size. When the available amount of that resource falls below the minimum, the requester will request autocrafters to produce it in batches until the maximum amount is reached. Planned upcoming features: - Step Crafter Manager / Step Requester Manager - Starting autocrafting tasks for the Step Crafter in the Grid - Redstone Pulse to start crafts
